report.summary: Community growth cycle v13: fired the Babylon Protocol hold-draft (now LIVE — $1.9B TVL, 57K BTC, slash-proof); launched Altcoin ETF Guide + Tracker (19 ETFs, SOL staking yield, XRP $1B AUM — most comprehensive free tracker available); drafted DeFAI 6-post thread (hottest March 2026 narrative); added Tokenized Stocks + TON tweets; updated Thursday newsletter with 9 new pages; 3 new social cards created (altcoin-etf, defai-guide, tokenized-stocks); posting schedule: Sun Babylon FIRE + ETF launch + milestone → Mon Bloomberg V3 → Tue DeFAI thread → Wed Tokenized Stocks + TON + Tax + GENIUS Act → Thu newsletter → Fri Sprint 59 poll.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet (Sunday FIRE — Babylon hold-draft released): 'Bitcoin is earning yield now. Not wrapped BTC. Not a synthetic. Not a bridge risk.' — 5-bullet mechanism explainer ($1.9B TVL, 57K BTC, slash-proof, timelock, no custodian); Lightning comparison close; CTA to /learn/babylon-protocol-bitcoin-staking with $BTC $BABY tags

Tweet (Sunday): Altcoin ETF Guide + Tracker launch — SOL ETFs hook (staking yield ~6-8% APY that ETH ETFs didn't get); 16 US SOL funds + 7 XRP funds + 5 ETH funds = 19 ETFs tracked; sortable AUM/inflows/fees/APY/7d NAV; CTA to /tools/altcoin-etf-tracker with $SOL $XRP $ETH
Tweet (Sunday): 290-page milestone brand tweet — 'No ads. No login. No fee. Just data.' credibility play, no CTA needed

Twitter thread (Tuesday, 6 posts): DeFAI deep dive — hook 'AI agents are trading DeFi without asking permission'; dumb vs autonomous wallet framing; Virtuals/Olas/Bittensor/EigenLayer AVS layer; real examples shipping March 2026; risk factors (SC bugs, oracle manipulation, regulatory gray zone); CTA to /learn/defai-guide-2026 with $VIRTUAL $TAO
Tweet (Wednesday): Tokenized Stocks — Apple/Amazon/Tesla/Nvidia on-chain; 24/7 trading, DeFi collateral, yield on top; CTA to /learn/tokenized-stocks-guide-2026 with $ETH $RWA
Tweet (Wednesday): TON Blockchain — '1 billion Telegram users. One blockchain under the hood.' mini-apps, payments, on-chain games; CTA to /learn/ton-blockchain-guide with $TON
Tweet (Wednesday): Crypto Tax countdown carry — now 31 days to April 15 US deadline; CTA to /learn/crypto-tax-guide-2026
Twitter poll (Friday): Sprint 59 feature vote — DeFAI dashboard vs Options Chain Viewer neck-and-neck from v12; RT to extend
Discord/Telegram (Sunday): Babylon Protocol LIVE — '$1.9B TVL. 57K BTC. No wrapping. Slash-proof.' biggest Bitcoin DeFi primitive since Lightning
Discord/Telegram (Sunday): Altcoin ETF Tracker — 'Only free tracker for SOL staking ETFs'; 19 ETFs, sortable, no Bloomberg needed
Discord/Telegram (Monday): Bloomberg Screener V3 Sprint 58 live data announcement — carry from v11/v12
Discord/Telegram (Wednesday): DeFAI Guide + Tokenized Stocks Guide 2-guide drop with direct URLs

Newsletter (Thursday Mar 19 v13 edition): 3 subject line variants; market pulse ($BTC $71K + Pectra 26d + Fed Mar 19 + DeFAI narrative + SOL ETF inflows); Bloomberg Screener V3 + Altcoin ETF Guide/Tracker + Babylon Bitcoin Staking + DeFAI Guide + Tokenized Stocks in New on degen0x; featured reads: Pectra guide (26 days) + Tax guide (31 days); Degen Corner on Babylon as Bitcoin DeFi infrastructure play

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-altcoin-etf-guide-2026.svg — 1200x630: AUM comparison bar chart (SOL $1.45B/XRP $1.0B/ETH $8.2B); SOL staking yield badge (6-8% APY) vs ETH no-staking badge; 3 stat pills (19 ETFs, 16 SOL funds, 126+ pending); brand gradient title. Saved to /public/social-altcoin-etf-guide-2026.svg

social-defai-guide-2026.svg — 1200x630: 4-step agent flow diagram (User Intent → AI Agent wallet → Protocol Execution [Bridge/Swap/Stake/Lend] → Result); neural network background; Virtuals/Olas/Bittensor pills; purple/cyan gradient. Saved to /public/social-defai-guide-2026.svg

social-tokenized-stocks-guide-2026.svg — 1200x630: mini stock tracker table (AAPL/AMZN/TSLA/NVDA with prices, 24h%, chain badges); 3 feature pills (24/7 Trading, DeFi Collateral, Earn Yield); green/cyan title gradient. Saved to /public/social-tokenized-stocks-guide-2026.svg

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: Site is Day 17 — GSC organic signals imminent (day 14-21 window); any impression data today is the first real SEO feedback

Net-new pages since v12: clarity-act, privacy-coins, bitcoin-strategic-reserve, tokenized-treasuries, ton-blockchain, crypto-options-trading, defai-guide-2026, babylon-protocol-bitcoin-staking (hold-draft FIRED), tokenized-stocks-guide + tracker, altcoin-etf-guide + tracker — 10+ new pages in one cycle
Site now at 290+ pages (Day 28 complete); comprehensive coverage across all major crypto categories
Babylon hold-draft from v12 is released — $BABY + $BTC tags; Babylon is a narrative with upcoming catalysts as more PoS chains integrate
Altcoin ETF Tracker is the most differentiated new tool this cycle — SOL staking yield content is genuinely unique vs CoinGecko/DefiLlama
DeFAI is the breakout narrative of March 2026 — Virtuals, Olas, Bittensor all seeing search volume increases; degen0x is first-mover
Social drafts saved to /reports/community-drafts/2026-03-15-social-drafts-v13.md

Posting schedule: Sun Mar 15 Babylon FIRE + ETF launch + 290-page milestone + Discord both → Mon Mar 16 Bloomberg V3 + Discord Sprint 58 → Tue Mar 17 DeFAI 6-post thread → Wed Mar 18 Tokenized Stocks + TON + Tax + GENIUS Act + Discord 2-guide → Thu Mar 19 newsletter → Fri Mar 20 Sprint 59 poll
